no_changes_rationale:
status: complete
reason: The requested provider-scoped recent-usage flow is already present in the repository: the GraphQL resolver accepts `provider`, `AgentSession.provider` and `WorkerExecutionResult.Tier` are exposed in the schema/model layer, and the provider drilldown page renders recent usage rows.
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server -run 'TestAgentSessionsGraphQLFiltersByProvider|TestWorkerResultFromRecordIncludesTier' && cd internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test 'src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/providers/agent-endpoints.e2e.ts'
